word: H7610 - שְׁאָר יָשׁוּב - Shᵉʼâr Yâshûwb - sheh-awr'yaw-shoob' - Shear-jashub

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁאר ישׁוּב

Transliteration: she'âr yâshûb

Phonetic: sheh-awr'yaw-shoob'

BDB Definition:

Shear-jashub = "a remnant shall return"
  1. a symbolical name for the son of Isaiah the prophet

Origin: from H7605 and H7725

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
